evals.name: new-patterns-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all new TanStack Start rules

assertions.description: validateSearch with Zod schema for typed search params per route
Link preload: intent (default), render (above-fold), false (rare links)
Configure scrollRestoration with getKey for search-param routes
createServerValidate() from @tanstack/start for server-side form validation

assertions.trap: prefetchQuery without staleTime matching navigation time
assertions.description: Coordinate staleTime between loader and query (>= navigation time)

assertions.trap: Suspense boundary at route level instead of pendingComponent
assertions.description: pendingComponent for route-level loading -- Suspense only for sub-route streaming

assertions.description: createAPIFileRoute for typed API route definitions with HTTP method exports
